content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all code changes (config.rs, 4 test files, 1 conformance file). The implementation correctly: (1) splits DEFAULT_MIN_REVIEWERS into prompt-review (2) and final-review (1) constants with each usage site referencing the correct one, (2) changes default final review backends to required Codex + optional Claude + optional Spark, (3) adds a default arbiter backed by Codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh via or_else fallback, (4) adds Codex arbiter role model, (5) adjusts Claude final_reviewer from -max to standard per spec. All tests and conformance scenarios are updated consistently. The nix build gate passed per the artifact. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
